title: The Perils of Penelope: The Hypnotic Gem
overview: Penelope (Elizabeth Raven) is back in an all-new adventure! The Nazis (Debbie D) want the “hypnotic gem” and will stop at nothing to get it including murdering a young girl (Laura Giglio) and leaving Penelope to be blown to bits! And will the present day Penelope also face death by drowning? Learn all this and more in the cliffhanger adventure, “The New Perils of Penelope!”.
